commits.message:
feat(SEL-2): add PDF export for monthly reporting module

Adds a new reporting endpoint that generates PDF documents from
aggregated monthly data. Uses Apache PDFBox under the hood.

The feature includes:
- PDF generation service with configurable templates
- REST endpoint POST /api/reports/monthly/export
- Background job scheduling via Quartz
- S3 upload for generated reports

Breaking change: ReportService interface now requires an ExportFormat parameter.

Tested with: JUnit 5, Mockito, Testcontainers (PostgreSQL 14)

Resolves SEL-2
Related: SEL-1
